messengerConfirmedEventUpdate.title: Messenger Confirmed Event Update
messengerConfirmedEventUpdate.description: Send the user reminders or updates for an event they have registered for (e.g., purchased tickets). This tag may be used for upcoming events and events in progress.

messengerPostPurchaseUpdate.title: Messenger Post Purchase Update
messengerPostPurchaseUpdate.description: Notify the user of an update on a recent purchase. Confirmation of transaction, such as invoices or receipts, Notifications of shipment status, such as product in-transit, shipped, delivered, or delayed.

magicLink.label: Magic Link
magicLink.nameHint: Appended after /r/{workspaceId}/ in the public tracking URL. Use letters, numbers, underscore, and hyphen only.
magicLink.urlHint: Use double braces in the URL, e.g. https://example.com/page?utm_campaign='{{campaign}}'. Values come from the tracking link query string.

authCallbackUrl.label: Auth Callback URL
authCallbackUrl.hint: Register this exact URL as the OAuth redirect URI in your provider app. It must use this host, not your custom domain — the provider cannot reach a custom domain.

signInCallbackUrl.label: Sign-in Callback URL
signInCallbackUrl.hint: Add this to your Google app's authorized redirect URIs to enable Google sign-in.

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.hint: Register this exact Webhook URL in your provider app. It must use this host, not your custom domain — the provider cannot reach a custom domain.

coexist.title: Sync existing contacts and chat history?
coexist.descriptionWhatsapp: When enabled, ChatbotX will import contacts and up to 6 months of chat history from this WhatsApp number.
coexist.descriptionMessenger: When enabled, ChatbotX will import existing Messenger contacts and up to 3 months of conversation history from this Page.
coexist.billingNote: Large pages may take several hours to complete.
coexist.toggleLabel: Sync existing contacts and chat history
coexist.toggleHelper: Re-enabling only works if Meta has buffered data (within 24 hours of onboarding). Otherwise disconnect and reconnect.
coexist.toggleHelperMessenger: Re-enabling only works if Meta has buffered data (within 24 hours of onboarding). Otherwise disconnect and reconnect the Messenger page.
coexist.toggleHelperWhatsapp: Re-enabling only works if Meta has buffered data (within 24 hours of onboarding). Otherwise disconnect and reconnect the WhatsApp number.

success.enabled: Sync started. Historical contacts and messages will appear shortly.

errors.alreadyTriggered: Sync was already triggered for this number. Please wait for Meta to deliver the historical data.

errors.notEligible: This number is not eligible for historical sync.
errors.triggerFailed: Could not start the sync. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: Could not enable sync. Please try again later.

messenger.description: This integration lets you create Messenger bots.
messenger.welcomeMessageDescription: This is the first message the user will receive from your Bot. This message is sent when the user interacts for the first time with the Bot by clicking on the 'Get Started' button.
messenger.conversationStartersDescription: Conversation Starters provide a way for users to start a conversation with your business with a list of frequently asked questions.
messenger.persistentMenuDescription: The menu can be configured to help users to more easily discover and access your Bot features. The menu is always available to users. This menu should contain the top-level actions that users can use it at any time. Having a menu easily communicates the basic capabilities of your bot for beginners and returned users.
messenger.dynamicPersistentMenuDescription: Allows you to dynamically change the persistent menu at any time at the user level.
messenger.botProfileDescription: This setting allows you to set a different name and image for your bot
messenger.personasDescription: This setting allows you to set a different name and image for your bot
messenger.reconnectDescription: Always reconnect your bot if your Messenger bot is not responding, or if you are seem any permission error on the error log.
messenger.title: Facebook Messenger

description.INELIGIBLE_ON_BEHALF_OF_WABA: The WhatsApp Business Account uses the OBO model, which is not supported. You must first transfer ownership of the WABA to the customer or onboard using the Intent API.
description.INELIGIBLE_INACTIVE_OR_RESTRICTED: The WhatsApp Business Account is inactive or restricted from messaging due to a policy enforcement issue.
description.INELIGIBLE_COUNTRY_NOT_SUPPORTED: The WhatsApp Business Account is in a region that does not support the MM Lite API.
description.INELIGIBLE_USING_WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_APP: The WhatsApp Business phone number is being used within the WhatsApp Business app.
description.ELIGIBLE: The WhatsApp Business Account is eligible to onboard and use the MM Lite API.
description.PENDING_VALID_PAYMENT_METHOD: The WhatsApp Business Account requires setting up a valid payment method.
description.PENDING_INTERNAL_SETUP: The WhatsApp Business Account is being configured to use the MM Lite API and requires no further action from the business customer or partner. The automated setup process is estimated to take less than ten minutes. Subscribe to the account_update webhook and listen for the AD_ACCOUNT_LINKED event. Submit a support ticket if the setup process takes more than ten minutes and you have not received a webhook.
description.ONBOARDED: The WhatsApp Business Account has successfully onboarded and is ready to use the MM Lite API.
